description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a large multi-car garage, a paved driveway, and a walkway leading to the main entrance, which is accented by a vertical garden and minimalist landscaping. The rear of the house includes a private backyard with a circular patio, outdoor seating, and a small pool, surrounded by manicured greenery and tall, slender trees. Large windows line the upper and lower floors, allowing for ample natural light and providing a sense of openness. The exterior is predominantly white with subtle gray accents, giving the house a sleek and contemporary appearance. The layout is open and spacious, with visible interior rooms and modern furnishings.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a multi-car garage, and a landscaped yard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the multi-car garage, paved driveway, main entrance with vertical garden, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, windowless wall, driveway extension, and a glimpse of the backyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a circular patio, pool, outdoor seating, and tall trees along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side yard, and partial view of the backyard pool and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a minimalist door, vertical garden accent, paved walkway, and no porch or overhang.
